title: Write an Oban worker with args validation in perform/1
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.ExportWorker` (queue `:exports`, max_attempts 3). perform/1 should destructure `%{"export_id" => id, "format" => format}` from `%Oban.Job{}` and validate that `format` is one of `"csv"`, `"json"`, or `"xlsx"`. If not, return `{:cancel, {:invalid_format, format}}`. Otherwise call `MyApp.Exports.run(id, format)` and return its result. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/export_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Standard args destructuring + list membership check + modern return form.
